title: stachys recta subsp. delphinensis
intro: Stachys recta subsp. delphinensis, also known as Delphinium Stachys, is a subspecies of the Stachys recta plant, which is a member of the mint family and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of iridoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stachys recta subsp. delphinensis include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as the alleviation of muscle and joint pain. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
